summary: Comprehensive testing of HevaPOS Iteration 24 - All critical features verified. 27/30 backend tests PASSED (3 skipped due to rate limiting). Frontend UI testing completed successfully. CRITICAL: PDF download is NOW WORKING (user's #1 complaint resolved). Login, POS, Dashboard, Reports, KDS, QR Menu, Settings, and Cash Drawer all functioning correctly.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (10/min) can block rapid testing - not a bug, security feature

issues: Console warning: Chart width/height -1 - recharts container sizing issue (non-blocking, visual only)

critical_code_review_comments: PDF Download: FIXED - Uses fetch+blob approach, downloads actual PDF file with correct headers
Multi-tenancy: Categories and Products are correctly filtered by restaurant_id server-side (not exposed in response model)
QR Menu: Public access working at /menu/{restaurant_id}/{table_hash} - no auth required
Cash Drawer: Accessible by staff users (role='user') - not restricted to admin only
KDS: Back button present, tickets display correctly with bump workflow
Settings: Security tab with Manager PIN form working

success_rate.backend: 90% (27/30 passed, 3 skipped due to rate limiting)

seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data - 11 products, 4 categories, 20+ pending orders
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 comprehensive testing complete. All major features verified: Login (3 user types), POS (products, categories, cart, orders), Dashboard (metrics, charts), Reports (stats, PDF download), KDS (tickets, bump workflow), QR Menu (public access), Settings (Security tab with Manager PIN), Cash Drawer (staff accessible). PDF download is confirmed working - downloads actual PDF file. Multi-tenancy is enforced server-side. Rate limiting is 10 requests/minute on login endpoint.
